title: Best Buttermilk Biscuit Recipe
ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour (can substitute 1:1 GF flour)
7 tablespoons unsalted butter, chilled in freezer and cut into thin slices
instructions: Mix together dry ingredients. Cut in butter until crumbly mixture using pastry blender or your hands. Lightly stir in cold buttermilk until forms a dough. Place on flour covered board and form into a rectangle. Fold the rectangle in thirds. Turn dough a half turn, gather any crumbs, and flatten back into a rectangle. Repeat twice more, folding and pressing the dough a total of three times. If you have time, refrigerate the dough for 30 minutes or more. Roll out the dough in a rectangle about ½ inch thick. Cut into biscuits, makes a dozen. Place biscuits on parchment lined baking sheet, brush tops with buttermilk and bake at 400 degrees F for 15-16 minutes.
